title: SIMONKA PLACE - 211info
text: SIMONKA PLACE FOR WOMEN AND CHILDREN SIMONKA PLACE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency shelter. Services available to guests include food, emergency clothing, laundry, mail services, faith-based addiction and mental health counseling, and case management. Guests may have the opportunity to move forward into the New Life Fellowship transitional housing program. Shelter availability may vary depending on the time of day. 5119 River Road N Keizer, OR 973030431 Eligibility: Women age 18 and older who are experiencing homelessness or have minor children (boys must be 17 years or younger). Service animals accepted. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 362-7487 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 362-7487 Reception (503) 856-8058 FAX Main phone (503) 362-7487 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID (may be obtained after intake) AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: 7 days per week 10am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located north of Chemawa Road. Accessible via Salem Mass Transit Bus 9 and 19. Services: Community Shelters * Homeless Families Community Shelters * Homeless Women Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - MEALS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
